digest.title: How Businesses Are Building Specialized AI They Can Trust
digest.tldr: Companies are asking how to build specialized AI that fits with the way their workflows actually run.  The first wave of enterprise AI was about access.

digest.title: Build real agentic apps using CUGA: two dozen working examples on a lightweight harness
NVIDIA Powers Over 400 of the World’s 500 Fastest Supercomputers
digest.tldr: News Highlights: NVIDIA technology runs 81% of the TOP500 and 90% of the systems new to the list.  26 systems on the TOP500 adopted the NVIDIA Grace CPU, up eight from the previous list.

digest.title: Meta launches cheaper smart glasses without Ray-Ban
digest.tldr: For the past three years, "Meta" and "Ray-Ban" have been synonymous in the smart glasses space.  Not anymore.

digest.title: NVIDIA Brings Trusted, 24/7 AI Agents to Telecom Operations
digest.tldr: Telecom operators have seen remarkable returns from using generative AI to automate network management, customer care and back-office operations.  Most of that impact has been task‑based: automation that speeds up…
